summary: The Blue Lion's daughter, Lady Isabel, meets a young man named Chen who claims to have helped her in the past. She asks him to escort them to the capital, but he declines, citing his family's dispute with the Weyl family. However, Chen proposes an alternative plan: to travel together and settle the dispute through a mutual benefit. Lady Isabel agrees, and they set off on their journey. Meanwhile, other characters mention rumors of a disease affecting the Blue Lion and speculations about Lady Isabel's next move.
key_moments: Lady Isabel meets Chen and asks him to escort her to the capital
Chen declines, citing his family's dispute with the Weyl family
Chen proposes an alternative plan: traveling together to settle the dispute
